title: viola × valentiana
intro: Viola × valentiana, also known as heart seed or valerian heart seed, is a hybrid plant derived from the Viola and Valeriana species, and is primarily used for its medicinal and herbal properties. The plant contains valerenic acid, which is responsible for its sedative and calming effects, and has been used to treat restlessness, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Viola × valentiana include promoting relaxation, reducing stress, and improving sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for individuals with sleep disorders. Viola × valentiana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
